title: eriogonum fasciculatum
intro: Eriogonum fasciculatum, also known as California buckwheat or Desert buckwheat, is a shrubby perennial plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stop bleeding and heal wounds due to the presence of tannins, flavonoids, and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Eriogonum fasciculatum include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and combat infections. Eriogonum fasciculatum is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve to harness its medicinal properties, and it has been traditionally used by Native American communities for various health issues.
